Hero.title: Travel, enjoy and live a new and full life
Hero.subtitle: From quick airport drops and premium car rentals to extensive South India tours. Experience comfort, safety, and ultimate reliability with Zytravo Trvls.

rentals.title: Car Rentals
rentals.description: Chauffeur-driven hatchbacks, sedans, and SUVs for hourly or daily requirements.

tours.title: Tour Packages
tours.description: Curated trips across South India from Pondicherry to Ooty, Munnar, and Hampi.

transfers.title: Airport Transfers
transfers.description: Punctual pick-up and drop-off spanning Chennai, Bangalore, and local airports.

hire.title: Hire a Driver
hire.description: Professional, background-verified drivers available for your own vehicle.

WhyUs.title: Experience the highest standard of travel
WhyUs.subtitle: We don't just provide a vehicle; we deliver a premium, stress-free travel experience across South India with Zytravo Trvls.

safety.title: Safety First, Always
safety.description: Every vehicle in our fleet undergoes rigorous maintenance checks before every single trip.

chauffeurs.title: Elite Chauffeurs
chauffeurs.description: Our drivers are permanently employed, background-verified professionals with years of inter-city expertise.

reliability.title: 24/7 Reliability
reliability.description: Flight delayed at 3 AM? We'll be there. Our dispatch and support team operates around the clock.

CTA.title: Ready to start your journey?
CTA.subtitle: Book your reliable ride today and experience the absolute best in comfort and safety across South India.

safe.title: Completely Sanitized
safe.description: Every vehicle undergoes deep cleaning and sanitization before handover.

price.title: Transparent Pricing
price.description: No hidden costs. Pay exactly what you see including GST and base tolls.

support.title: 24/7 Roadside Assist
support.description: GPS enabled tracking and full 24/7 support throughout your journey.

Tours.title: Curated Tour Packages
Tours.subtitle: Explore the rich heritage and natural beauty of South India with our carefully crafted itineraries.

Transfers.title: Hassle-Free Airport Transfers
Transfers.subtitle: Punctual pick-ups and drop-offs to all major airports. We track your flight in real-time.

pricing.title: Transparent Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Pre-fixed rates. Zero surge pricing. Zero hidden fees.

delay.title: Flight Delayed? No Problem.
delay.description: For airport pick-ups, the first 60 minutes of waiting after your scheduled landing time are completely free. Our dispatch team monitors flight statuses in real time.

DriverHire.title: Professional Drivers on Hire
DriverHire.subtitle: Got your own car but need a reliable driver? Hire our verified, highly-trained chauffeurs.

standard.title: The Zytravo Standard
standard.subtitle: We don't just provide drivers; we provide peace of mind. Every chauffeur undergoes strict verification.

safe.title: 100% Safe & Insured
safe.description: Optional daily transit insurance covers your vehicle during your trip.

About.title: About Zytravo Trvls
About.subtitle: Your trusted travel partner in Puducherry, delivering safe, reliable, and comfortable travel experiences.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.description: To be the most trusted and preferred travel partner in Puducherry and across South India.

mission.title: Our Mission
list: Provide safe and comfortable travel solutions for every journey.
Maintain a fleet of modern, well-maintained vehicles.
Offer transparent pricing with no hidden charges.
Deliver exceptional customer service at every touchpoint.

values.title: Our Core Values
values.safety_desc: Safety of passengers is our top priority at all times
values.reliability_desc: On-time pick-up and drop — we always keep our promises
values.transparency_desc: Clear pricing, no hidden costs or last-minute surprises
values.customer_desc: Every decision is made with the customer in mind

Contact.title: Contact Support
Contact.subtitle: Have questions or need assistance with your booking? We're here to help 24/7.
